div.div:
THE BOTTOM LINE
MapLibre = visualizer
GeoGateway = orchestrator
Valhalla = route calculator

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(253, 236, 236), rgb(58, 28, 28)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(205, 66, 70), rgb(239, 115, 119));

display: inline-block; font-size: 16px; font-family: "Arial"; color: light-dark(#7A271A, #FFD4CE); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
MAPLIBRE DOES NOT ROUTE
It draws normalized route GeoJSON and handles interaction.
Road calculations remain outside the renderer.

div.div:
ETA
Duration is provider-derived and traffic-independent.

div.div:
NORMALIZED RESPONSE
Route geometry, alternatives, distance, duration and maneuvers share one contract.

div.div:
CACHE + PROVIDER DISPATCH
Stable keys can return cached output before Valhalla is called.

div.div:
LABELLED FALLBACK ONLY
Provider failure → Haversine straight line
No ETA · no maneuvers
No navigable-route claim

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 454px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1005px; margin-left: 1344px;

div.div:
RUNTIME · 2026-07-19
Valhalla + shared cache available
Nominatim disabled · ETA traffic-independent
